description: The Mazzarella clan is a powerful Camorra organization based in Naples, Italy, founded in the 1960s by the Mazzarella brothers. Initially involved in cigarette smuggling, it grew into a major criminal group engaged in drug trafficking, money laundering, and other illicit activities. The clan has been involved in violent conflicts with rival Camorra clans and has international connections with the Sicilian Mafia and South American cartels. Despite internal fragmentation, it remains active.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2009, Ciro Mazzarella, born in 1971, was arrested in Santo Domingo , Dominican Republic . In the country, he lived in a luxurious residence and held the reins of the clan especially for the management of drug trafficking.
country_links.context: Ciro Mazzarella was arrested in Santo Domingo, where he lived and managed drug trafficking for the clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: Since the 20th century, the clan is known to be also active in France . In 2004 Vincenzo Mazzarella, one of the founders of the organization, was arrested in Paris .
country_links.context: The clan is active in France, and Vincenzo Mazzarella was arrested in Paris for diamond dealing.

country_links.evidence_quote: cigarette smuggling that arrived from Montenegro .
country_links.context: Cigarette smuggling arrived from Montenegro to the clan's base in Switzerland.

country_links.evidence_quote: Operating from Barcelona , Salvatore Zazo, one of the top members of the clan, was allegedly involved in a large scheme of international cocaine trafficking from Peru to Europe , with the intention to acquire total control of the Port of Callao ; one of his contacts was the drug lord Gerald Oropeza, one of the biggest traffickers in Peru.
country_links.context: The clan, operating from Barcelona, was involved in cocaine trafficking from Peru to Europe, aiming to control the Port of Callao.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2002 he was arrested in Spain ... According to the Spanish police, in Spain the clan is active in Marbella , Fuengirola , Zaragoza and Ceuta .
country_links.context: Ciro Mazzarella was arrested in Spain, and the clan is active in Marbella, Fuengirola, Zaragoza, and Ceuta.

country_links.evidence_quote: in 1992 he decided to move to Switzerland , after losing a war between Camorra clans in Naples. From his logistics base in Lugano , he created an enviable economic Empire with cigarette smuggling that arrived from Montenegro .
country_links.context: Ciro Mazzarella moved to Switzerland and used a logistics base in Lugano to run his smuggling empire.
